name: golden oracle: the HIPAA and full-stack-AWS visions yield distinct tailored designs, proving tailoring not a fixed template
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/business-translate.sh" --profile "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/golden/healthcare-booking-hipaa-profile.json" --out h.json --now 2026-06-08T00:00:00Z 2>/dev/null; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/business-translate.sh" --profile "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/golden/fullstack-international-aws-profile.json" --out a.json --now 2026-06-08T00:00:00Z 2>/dev/null; node -e 'const H=new Set(Object.values(JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("h.json","utf8")).pillars).flat().map(c=>c.concern));const A=new Set(Object.values(JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("a.json","utf8")).pillars).flat().map(c=>c.concern));process.exit(H.has("audit_logging")&&!A.has("audit_logging")&&A.has("cdn")&&!H.has("cdn")?0:1)' && echo two-distinct-scenarios 1>&2
